html:
2026-0510
2026-05-28AAFCFarm Income Protection ActOrder Authorizing the Minister of Agriculture and Agri-Food to enter into an Agreement with Nova Scotia to provide federal contributions to assist dairy and livestock producers and wild blueberry producersOrder authorizing the Minister of Agriculture and Agri-Food to enter into an agreement with Nova Scotia to provide federal contributions of up to $15 million under the Agricultural Disaster Relief Program (AgriRecovery) to assist dairy and livestock producers and wild blueberry producers with the extraordinary costs incurred as a result of drought during the summer of 2025.N/A
subject: Order Authorizing the Minister of Agriculture and Agri-Food to enter into an Agreement with Nova Scotia to provide federal contributions to assist dairy and livestock producers and wild blueberry producers
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Agriculture and Agri-Food to enter into an agreement with Nova Scotia to provide federal contributions of up to $15 million under the Agricultural Disaster Relief Program (AgriRecovery) to assist dairy and livestock producers and wild blueberry producers with the extraordinary costs incurred as a result of drought during the summer of 2025.
